ai_summary_enabled.description: Show AI summary panel on post detail (Groq cost kill-switch).

ai_chat_enabled.description: Show the Ask-AI chat section on post detail (Groq cost kill-switch).

hybrid_search_enabled.description: Use semantic + keyword hybrid search; off falls back to keyword-only.

moderation_ai_advisory.description: Show the AI verdict chip in the moderation queue.

maintenance_banner.description: Non-empty text shows a maintenance banner app-wide; empty hides it.
